category_sources: Official repository README at https://github.com/scalaenv/scalaenv describes a Scala environment management tool.
source_facts.description: Command-line tool to manage Scala environments.
display_name_sources: Official repository name at https://github.com/scalaenv/scalaenv is scalaenv.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface linked by source_facts.homepage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has value https://github.com/scalaenv/scalaenv, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description says it manages Scala environments.
source_facts.executables includes scalaenv, scalaenv-install, and scalaenv-uninstall.
